description: 几何=逻辑。圆/三角/方/星代表4步，色彩有心理学意义。
base_style_prompt: Bauhaus design principles. White (#FAFAFA) background, red (#E53935), blue (#1E88E5), yellow (#FDD835), black (#212121). Circle, triangle, square, star represent four steps. Color has psychological meaning. Form follows function. Geometric clarity, rational order.
